calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Writ Of Mandate And Complaint For Civil Penalty
Off Calendar Jul-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul J. Brennan of Rains, Lucia and Wilkinson, LLP, 925-609-1699, appearing for petitioner
Lawrence Hecimovich of the City Attorney's Office, 554-3933, appearing for respondent

The Court made a personal disclosure and there being no objections, the matter was argued. PETITIONER ANDREW COHEN'S Motion For Writ Of Mandate And Complaint For Civil Penalty was denied. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (301/PJB/xGW) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189

Order To Show Cause Re Enforcement Of Police Commission Subpoena
Off Calendar Jul-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul J. Brennan of Rains, Lucia and Wilkinson, LLP, 925-609-1699, appearing for petitioner
Lawrence Hecimovich of the City Attorney's Office, 554-3933, appearing for respondent

The Court made a personal disclosure and there being no objections, the matter was argued. Respondent City and County of San Francisco's ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE ENFORCEMENT OF POLICE COMMISSION SUBPOENA: the Court directed that compliance be compelled. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/xGW) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
